plan.title: Test: trace what calls complete-planning after agent finishes
plan.author: plan

narratives.Problem: Need to verify the complete-planning orchestration flow works end-to-end.
narratives.Proposal: Create test-trace.txt as a trivial task to exercise the planning → implementation → completion pipeline.
narratives.Constraint: File must be deleted after testing — no artifacts should remain.
narratives.Risk: None — this is a throwaway test.
narratives.Alternative: None considered — the issue is prescriptive.

narrative.Action: Create test-trace.txt in the workspace root with a simple message, then delete it.

subItems.title: test-trace.txt is created in workspace root
